name: ElephantSQL
description: ElephantSQL — Managed PostgreSQL cloud service with connection pooling and follower databases across regions.

seo.title: ElephantSQL — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: ElephantSQL: ElephantSQL — Managed PostgreSQL cloud service with connection pooling and follower databases across regions.

when_to_use: Managed Postgres cloud service for hobby and production apps
Postgres with automated connection pooling and follower DBs
Quick Postgres provisioning in AWS, Azure, or GCP regions
Shared Postgres tiers for cost-sensitive early-stage startups
Managed database for Heroku or Render-hosted applications

pros: Simple managed PostgreSQL with generous free tier
cons: Limited features vs Neon, Supabase, RDS
No modern dev features like branching
review.verdict: Legacy managed Postgres being wound down, migrate to Neon, Supabase, or RDS for new projects.
review.best_for: Existing ElephantSQL customers planning an orderly migration off the service
review.not_for: New projects, given the announced service sunset

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
